blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh. That actually means something coming from you.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Aight. See you there. Don't be late.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: LMBOO — yeah bro every morning. You know this. Aight let's go.
He waited a second, then hung up anyway.
I thought about it. For real.

blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: You're not enrolled at Lincoln High.
Larry Jr. looked at me like I might overturn the ruling. I don't overturn Mr. Cole's rulings.

blocks.speaker: Larry Jr.
blocks.content: Tell me everything when you get back.
